LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS UNITED BEHAVIORAL HEALTH, UNITED BEHAVIORAL HEALTH PLAN CALIFORNIA AND UNITED HEALTHCARE SERVICES, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM AUG-21-2013 TO LAW AND MOTION AT AUG-28-2013, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: CONTINUED TO AUGUST 28, 2013. IN THE STIPULATION TO CONTINUE HEARING SUBMITTED TO THE COURT ON AUGUST 15, 2013, THE PARTIES REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT TO SEPTEMBER 3, 2013, WHICH IS THE DATE OF TRIAL. LAW & MOTION MATTERS ARE NOT HEARD ON THE DATE OF TRIAL. (SEE SFLR 8.2A(2)(C).) IF THE CASE IS SETTLED PRIOR TO AUGUST 28, 2013 OR IF THE PARTIES WISH TO TAKE THE MOTION OFF CALENDAR, THE PARTIES ARE REQUESTED TO LET THE COURT KNOW IMMEDIATELY BY SENDING AN EMAIL TO CALENDAR302@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Continued To Aug-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS UNITED BEHAVIORAL HEALTH, UNITED BEHAVIORAL HEALTH PLAN CALIFORNIA AND UNITED HEALTHCARE SERVICES, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to August 28, 2013. In the Stipulation to Continue Hearing submitted to the Court on August 15, 2013, the parties requested a continuance of Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment to September 3, 2013, which is the date of trial. Law & Motion matters are not heard on the date of trial. (See SFLR 8.2A(2)(c).) If the case is settled prior to August 28, 2013 or if the parties wish to take the motion off calendar, the parties are requested to let the Court know immediately by sending an email to calendar302@sftc.org.
